title: Jamie's Pasta Salad
description: A hearty cold pasta salad: tri-color rotini tossed with tuna, crunchy bell peppers, cucumber, and whole cherry tomatoes in ranch dressing.

items: 1 bottle ranch or bacon ranch dressing
Cherry tomatoes, lots (1–2 pints), left whole

instructions: Boil the tri-color rotini until al dente, then drain. Put it in a mixing bowl and refrigerate until cool.
Cut the bell peppers into 1–2 cm strips. Cut the cucumber into quarters lengthwise, then slice.
Add ranch dressing to the cooled pasta, then add the drained tuna.
Add the vegetables, leaving the cherry tomatoes whole. Stir until well mixed.

notes.label: Tip
notes.text: Bacon ranch works great here too. Keep chilled until ready to serve.
